page_metadata.biotools__summary: The APHIRM Toolkit is a set of OHS risk management procedures that target both physical and psychosocial hazards. A participative hazard identification and risk management toolkit for improving the risk management of musculoskeletal disorders.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The APHIRM Toolkit is a set of OHS risk management procedures that target both physical and psychosocial hazards. A participative hazard identification and risk management toolkit for improving the risk management of musculoskeletal disorders.
